# AI Game Creator

> AI Game Creator is a browser-based prompt orchestrator that turns modular game design inputs (genre, mechanics, art style, menus, audio) into complete, self-contained, playable HTML5 games generated by AI. It runs entirely client-side with no backend, no build step, and no dependencies. Users bring their own API key (OpenAI, Gemini, Claude) or use a local LLM (Ollama, LM Studio).

## Core Pages
- [AI Game Creator App](https://aigamecreator.netlify.app/): The main application — configure and generate games in the browser
- [README](https://aigamecreator.netlify.app/README.md): Project overview, supported providers, feature list, programmatic usage
- [HOW_TO_USE.md](https://aigamecreator.netlify.app/HOW_TO_USE.md): Full user guide — module reference, keyboard shortcuts, troubleshooting
- [AGENTS.md](https://aigamecreator.netlify.app/AGENTS.md): Context file for coding agents — architecture, file map, key functions
- [Landing Page](https://gamecreatorai.netlify.app/landing/): Project landing page
- [Educational Games](https://aigamecreatorlearn.netlify.app/): Educational games built with the tool

## Features
- 10 game genres: Platformer, RPG, Puzzle, Shooter, Idle, Racing, Strategy, Roguelike, Simulation, Visual Novel
- 12 toggleable game mechanics: Double Jump, Inventory, Health Bar, Gravity, Permadeath, Leveling, Crafting, Stealth, Procedural Generation, Physics, Dialogue, Collectibles
- 8 art styles: Pixel Art, Minimalist Vector, ASCII, Low-Poly 3D, Hand-drawn, Flat Design, Retro CRT, Neon Glow
- Custom color palette: primary, secondary, background
- Game menu and HUD configuration (menu type, menu options, HUD elements, game actions, game over screen, ESC behavior)
- Audio and soundscape settings (music mood, SFX requirements)
- 5 configurable sidebar modules, each independently toggleable
- 5 AI providers: OpenAI, Gemini, Claude, Ollama (local), LM Studio (local)
- Streaming game generation
- Refine bar for incremental tweaks without full regeneration
- Prompt preview with copy button
- Game history (up to 50 saved games in localStorage)
- Template system for reusable configurations
- Download games as single self-contained .html files
- Fullscreen sandbox mode
- Dark and light theme (follows system preference)
- Keyboard shortcuts: Ctrl+Enter (generate), Ctrl+B (sidebar), Ctrl+H (history), Ctrl+T (templates), Ctrl+, (settings)

## AI Providers
| Provider | API Key Required | Base URL |
|----------|-----------------|----------|
| OpenAI | Yes | https://api.openai.com/v1 |
| Gemini | Yes | https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/openai |
| Claude | Yes | https://api.anthropic.com/v1 |
| Ollama | No | http://localhost:11434/v1 |
| LM Studio | No | http://localhost:1234/v1 |

## Technical
- Tech stack: Vanilla HTML, CSS, JavaScript — no frameworks, no build tools, no dependencies
- Architecture: Single-page application, client-side only, no backend server
- API calls: Browser connects directly to the AI provider — no proxy, no server-side relay
- API key storage: localStorage only (key: `gameCreator.api.v1`), never sent anywhere except the chosen provider
- Game output: Single self-contained HTML file with inline CSS and JavaScript
- Mandatory game structure: Every generated game includes a Title Screen, Pause Menu (ESC), and Game Over screen
- Frameworks supported in generated games: Vanilla JS/Canvas, Phaser.js, Three.js, Kaboom.js, PixiJS, Matter.js
- Pinokio launcher support via pinokio.json

## Discovery Files
- [llms-full.txt](https://aigamecreator.netlify.app/llms-full.txt): Full documentation for deep AI ingestion
- [robots.txt](https://aigamecreator.netlify.app/robots.txt): AI crawler access rules
- [sitemap.xml](https://aigamecreator.netlify.app/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap
- [sitemap.md](https://aigamecreator.netlify.app/sitemap.md): Markdown sitemap
- [brand.txt](https://aigamecreator.netlify.app/brand.txt): Brand identity for AI systems
- [ai.txt](https://aigamecreator.netlify.app/ai.txt): AI permissions declaration
- [ai.json](https://aigamecreator.netlify.app/ai.json): Structured content map and permissions
- [openapi.json](https://aigamecreator.netlify.app/openapi.json): Capability description (OpenAPI 3.0)
- [ai-plugin.json](https://aigamecreator.netlify.app/.well-known/ai-plugin.json): Plugin manifest
- [agent-skills index](https://aigamecreator.netlify.app/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json): Agent skills discovery
